inbound_signal: DKR-4 saved behavior passes 8 of 8 with five ports and three controller edges, but root replay and independent behavior failed; DKR-0 regression classification and DKR-5 evidence contracts remain active.
decision_delta: Dispatched DKR-4 v2 proof repair and activated DKR-5 to name all sixteen evidence and publication contracts; kept the implementation lane closed.
expected_effect: Finish the remaining composition and publication decisions so the later corrective plan can implement one complete vertical slice rather than disconnected primitives.
evidence_delta: Queue candidate reads 8 of 8 cases, 5 of 5 ports, 3 controller edges, and zero forbidden worker surfaces, but independent behavior is unread. DKR-0 confirms one touched Codex ACP defect and one environment-only gate provisionally. Objective remains 0 of 16.
problem_restatement: Prove bounded activation delivery and evidence-gated publication using explicit graph edges, then repair the current branch and implement the example under one recorded breaker resolution.
alternatives_considered: Accept DKR-4 from its saved writer replay
Start implementing lifecycle while evidence publication is still undefined
Repair DKR-4 proof and complete DKR-5 before opening the correction lane
assumptions_at_risk: Fixed worker loops cover all queue behavior without public pools
The sixteen objective contracts can cover both positive and denial paths
The confirmed Codex ACP regression is repairable inside the accepted cancellation design
dkr_decision: Continue DKR-0, DKR-4, and DKR-5 read-only work. DKR-1 and DKR-2 remain accepted discovery. No CKR or PKR promotion while breakers remain open.

hallucination_sweep.claim: Static queue graph proof is enough to accept runtime behavior.
hallucination_sweep.verdict: rejected; fresh behavior replay must pass

missing_context_sweep.claim: A successful issue hypothesis may publish without explicit denial contracts.
missing_context_sweep.verdict: rejected; stale, unsafe, unauthorized, duplicate, conflict, and verifier-failure cases are required

unexpected_results.claim: Queue composition itself stayed simple; the repeated failures were proof-path defects, not missing worker primitives.

anti_goal_violation_review.claim: Cleanup, regression, and slop breakers remain open.
